scripts.dev:backend: fuser -k 8000/tcp || true; cd backend && cargo watch -x run
scripts.dev: pnpm dlx concurrently "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:db" --names "WEB,API,DB" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && cd backend && cargo build --release --features embed-frontend
